create.selectClassHint: Only groups with subjects that do not have a weekly schedule template yet.

create.slotCountProgress: {{current}} / {{max}} slots per day ({{total}} h across {{days}} day(s))

create.slotLimitHint: Each slot repeats on all {{days}} selected day(s). With {{total}} weekly hours you can define up to {{max}} slots (if it does not divide evenly, the last slot covers the remainder on one day).
create.timeFormatHint: Required format HH:mm with two digits for hours and minutes (e.g. 08:15, not 8:15).
create.validationTimeFormat: Invalid format. Use two digits for hours and minutes (e.g. 08:15, not 8:15).

grid.title: Weekly grid (Mon–Fri)
grid.intro: Choose a group and assign each slot to a teacher–subject (Assignment).
grid.introClass: The class is the set of subjects sharing the same programme (course) and grade, taught in one shift (Group entity, e.g. Morning/Afternoon). Each cell lists teachers assigned to that subject for that group and school year.
grid.introSingleGroup: Single list: the **group** (`Group`, e.g. Morning/Afternoon) defines the set of assignments (`TeacherOnSubjectOnGroup`) for the school year. Each day lists the centre’s time slots; pick which assignment fills each slot.
grid.emptyClasses: No classes with teaching assignments for this school year.
grid.shiftGroupHint: Same Group as in the DB; only shifts with teaching for cycle+grade+year are listed.
grid.loadContextError: Could not load this group's timetable context.
grid.emptyClassAssignments: No teacher assignments for this class and school year. Check group–subject assignments.
grid.paletteHint: Click to select; Enter or cell click to place. Drag to the grid.
grid.keyboardHint: Keyboard: Tab through cells; select a subject and press Enter on an empty cell.
grid.peerResolveError: Could not resolve the teacher assignment for this group and subject.
grid.validationSubjectHours: Subject «{{subject}}» exceeds weekly hours (max {{max}} h, current {{current}} h).
grid.validationTeacherOverlap: Possible overlap: «{{label}}» on day {{day}} with another group.
